hero.title: Your appointments shouldn't live in your DMs anymore.

features.title: Take back control of your day
features.subtitle: No more Instagram DMs at 10pm, paper agendas or reminder texts. {app} handles the admin so you can stay focused on your craft.

items.title: A calendar that fills itself
items.description: Your available slots, breaks and days off — all visible at a glance. Reminders go out to your clients automatically. Never write another chase-up text at 10pm.

items.title: Your clients book while you sleep
items.description: Your booking page is online 24/7. Clients pick their service and time slot in three taps — no account to create, no DMs. By morning, your schedule is full.

items.title: Your whole schedule in your pocket
items.description: Set up your services and hours from your computer. Day to day, follow your schedule, confirm new appointments and get alerts right in the mobile app.

items.title: The whole team in sync
items.description: Each member has their own schedule, services and access code. You keep the overview. No more shared notebook, no more stepping on each other's toes.

secondaryFeatures.title: And everything else, already included
secondaryFeatures.subtitle: No modules to unlock, no hidden paid options. What you see is what you get.

items.title: Your online storefront
items.description: A real professional page with your services, reviews and photos — shareable with one link

items.title: QR code to display
items.description: A QR code for your counter or business cards. Your clients scan it, they book

items.title: No more no-shows
items.description: Automatic reminders 24h and 2h before every appointment. Fewer no-shows, a schedule that holds

items.title: Your numbers, made clear
items.description: Bookings, page views, weekly activity — all on one screen, updated live

items.title: Several locations, one calendar
items.description: Salon, home visits, on the go — up to 10 locations, each with its own availability

items.title: Tomorrow's recap, tonight
items.description: Every evening, you get tomorrow's schedule by email. No surprises when you wake up

items.title: iOS and Android app
items.description: Your schedule in your pocket, real-time notifications for every booking

items.title: Hosted in Europe
items.description: GDPR compliant, data hosted in France. You remain the owner of everything

sectors.title: Built for independents. All independents.
sectors.subtitle: From the mobile hairdresser to the studio tattoo artist, from the personal trainer to the therapist — {app} adapts to your craft, not the other way around.

testimonials.title: What independent professionals say about it

items.name: Marie L.
items.text: 0% commission is what won me over. I keep 100% of what I earn. And the tool is so simple I was online in 10 minutes.

items.name: Karim B.
items.text: The night I signed up, I already had three bookings through the link in my Instagram bio. No more answering DMs at 10pm to schedule a slot.

items.name: Sophie D.
items.text: There are three of us at the salon, each with our own calendar. For half of what we paid before — and better designed for our craft.

comparison.title: Why {app}, and not the others
comparison.subtitle: A clear price, zero commission, every essential feature from day one. No fine print, no hidden plan.
comparison.footnote: * "Free" plans usually include commissions taken on every booking, limited features or restricted support. ** Estimate based on an average price of €25 to €90/month, excluding additional commissions.

items.question: What is the best online appointment booking software for independent professionals?
items.answer: OPATAM is built specifically for independents and small teams: online calendar, personalized booking page, automatic reminders 24h and 2h before, mobile app — commission-free, ready in 5 minutes. Professionals from more than 15 industries use it.

items.question: How can my clients book online without creating an account?
items.answer: Your clients type their name, email and phone number — that's it. No account to create, no password. You get a personalized link and a QR code for your Instagram bio, your flyers or your storefront. Booking completed in 3 clicks.

items.question: How do I manage my team's appointments from a single tool?
items.answer: The Studio plan (€29.90/month) handles up to 10 synchronized calendars. Each member has their own schedule and services. You can notify them of every new appointment, send them the daily recap the night before, and keep the overview of the whole team.

items.question: How do I reduce missed appointments and client no-shows?
items.answer: OPATAM automatically sends a reminder 24h before the appointment, then a second one 2h before. Your clients also receive an instant confirmation when they book. In practice: fewer no-shows, more slots that hold, more revenue at the end of the month.

items.question: How much does professional online booking software cost?
items.answer: Two commitment-free plans: Pro at €19.90/month (or €199/year) for independents, Studio at €29.90/month (or €299/year) for teams up to 10 people. 30-day free trial, no credit card. And zero commission on your bookings — you keep 100% of what you charge.

items.question: Can I use an online booking calendar on my phone?
items.answer: Yes. The iOS and Android mobile app lets you check your calendar, confirm new appointments and receive notifications in real time. You set things up on your computer, and manage your day from your pocket — between appointments, on the subway, wherever you want.

items.question: Is OPATAM a good fit for beauty, wellness and coaching professionals?
items.answer: Hairdressers, beauticians, barbers, nail technicians, massage therapists, sophrologists, sports coaches, therapists, photographers, tradespeople, trainers… Every professional customizes their services, durations, prices and calendar exactly as they see fit.
